> Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add wshobson/agents --skill tailwind-design-system --skill k8s-security-policies --skill sql-optimization-patterns --skill helm-chart-scaffolding --skill gitops-workflow --skill k8s-manifest-generator -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/helm-chart-scaffolding`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/helm-chart-scaffolding.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add wshobson/agents --skill tailwind-design-system --skill k8s-security-policies --skill sql-optimization-patterns --skill helm-chart-scaffolding --skill gitops-workflow --skill k8s-manifest-generator -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Curated third-party skill source. Run external-skill-auditor before repo promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Helm chart scaffolding and best practices. From wshobson/agents multi-harness marketplace (36.8k stars; 84 plugins, 156 skills). One source, five harness adapters.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add wshobson/agents --skill helm-chart-scaffolding ... -y -g -a ...` status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named. Review generated artifacts (e.g. recipes, charts) before apply.

## Upstream Maintainer

[wshobson/agents](https://github.com/wshobson/agents) — large community agentic plugin/skill marketplace. MIT.

## Comparable Alternatives

Other backend/k8s/devops patterns from catalog (e.g. nodejs-backend, k8s-*, terraform-*) or local equivalents. A general-purpose agent instruction without this exact wshobson helm-chart-scaffolding contract.

&gt; Web evidence from wshobson/agents README + plugin docs (2026) + config notes. Evidence only; not endorsement.
